stemHtml: A de-icing /anti-icing procedure is carried out in two-steps. When does the hold-over time (HOT) start and how does humidity affect the HOT?

options.a: At the beginning of the anti-icing step, high humidity decreases the HOT.
options.b: At the beginning of the de-icing step, high humidity increases the HOT.
options.c: At the end of the anti-icing step high humidity decreases the HOT.
options.d: At the beginning of the anti-icing step, high humidity increases the HOT.
